rulings.Case Title: LYNN R. BARANCO et al VS. A.W. CHESTERTON COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Third Motion To Compel Defendant General Cable Corporations Person(S) Most Knowledgeable|Custodian Of Records Depositions And Request For Production Of Documents; And Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Wednesday, October 13, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. The compliance hearing on plaintiffs¿ third motion to compel the deposition of defendant General Cable¿s person most knowledgeable, etc. was continued from September 2. If any issues remain unresolved, by 4:00pm on October 12 the parties must send an email to contestasbestostr@sftc.org stating, without argument, what issues remain in dispute and appear at the hearing at 9:00 a.m. on October 13, 2010 in Department 220. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN CASEY et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (BP) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Compel Compliance With Deposition Subpoena For Production Of Business Records And Request For Sanctions Including Attorneys Fees
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, October 13, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 2. Defendant Swinerton Builders¿ motion to compel compliance of non party U.A. Local 38, Plumbers and Pipefitters with deposition subpoena for production of business records and request for sanctions is off calendar at the request of the moving party. =(220/HEK)
